settings.title: Settings
settings.providerHint: Provider identifier used for routing API key lookups (e.g. openai, anthropic, openai_compat).
settings.configSavedHint: Configuration saved. New values take effect on the next agent run.
settings.maxStepsHint: Hard cap on LLM steps per task. Hitting it fails the task with the reason recorded on the DAG node.
settings.agentTimeoutHint: Wall-clock timeout for the entire agent run (catches runaway loops). Recommended ≥ 600s.
settings.stepIdleHint: LLM stream silence between chunks. 0 disables idle detection (only wall-clock timeout applies). Changes apply to the next Agent / Chat / Planner task started; currently-running agents keep their old value.
settings.apiKeysIntro: Configure an LLM provider. Keys are stored locally and never leave this machine.
settings.languageIntro: Switch the UI language. Changes take effect immediately and persist across restarts.
settings.approvalPolicyIntro: Tasks that touch protected paths, run destructive commands, exceed budget, or escalate to a child mission will pause and ask for your approval.
settings.approvalTimeoutHint: How long to wait before an approval auto-expires. Range 30–3600s.
settings.protectedPathsHint: One per line. Path-prefix match against the workspace root (POSIX).
settings.destructiveCommandsHint: One per line. Matched against the first word of shell_exec calls (lowercased).
settings.budgetWarnRatioHint: 0–1. Trigger an approval when cumulative cost reaches this fraction of the contract budget. 0 disables.
settings.chatCommitSoftLinesHint: Chat-agent commits beyond this size require approval. 0 disables.
settings.diagnosticsIntro: Export a text bundle with the latest backend logs, app version, database summary, and recent errors. Use this when filing a bug report — sensitive data (API keys, your home username) is redacted automatically.

mission.title: Missions
mission.noMissionsHint: Click "New Mission" to start your first one.
mission.stopConfirmBody: Running agents will receive a cancel signal. Already-saved work is preserved.
mission.deleteConfirmBody: This removes the mission and all its tasks/agents/events. This cannot be undone.
mission.deleteConfirmBodyWithName: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
mission.deleteWithWorkspace: Also delete the workspace directory and worktrees
mission.restartConfirmBodyFull: All tasks reset to pending. Existing worktrees and commits stay intact.
mission.restartConfirmBodyFailed: Only failed/cancelled tasks ({{count}}) reset. Completed tasks stay.
mission.restartFullDescBody: This will reset all {{total}} tasks in {{name}} and delete associated agent data.
mission.restartFailedDescBody: This will reset {{count}} failed task(s) in {{name}}. Completed tasks will be preserved.
mission.restartHint: After restart, you will need to select a workspace and click Start.
mission.llmResolvedWarning_one: ⚠ {{count}} file resolved by AI — please review
mission.llmResolvedWarning_other: ⚠ {{count}} files resolved by AI — please review
mission.autoResolvedWarning_one: ⚠ {{count}} file auto-merged (theirs / heuristic) — verify if needed
mission.autoResolvedWarning_other: ⚠ {{count}} files auto-merged (theirs / heuristic) — verify if needed
mission.missionDescPlaceholder: What do you want the agents to build?
mission.workspaceHint: An empty directory becomes a fresh git repo. An existing repo is operated on directly.

planDialog.step1Subtitle: Describe your goal and choose a project source. The Planner will ground itself on the actual repository.
planDialog.descPlaceholder: e.g. Build a user authentication system with sign-up, login, and password reset
planDialog.fromScratchDesc: Auto-create under ~/miragenty-workspaces/ and run git init
planDialog.fromExistingDesc: Pick a local directory; pre-flight / planner can read it
planDialog.preflightCardDesc: Multi-turn chat with the AI to nail down scope/edge cases; sign a contract before handing off to the Planner.
planDialog.quickCardDesc: Skip clarification and go straight to the Planner Agent Loop. Use when the goal is already clear.

mission.chatPlaceholder: Ask a follow-up question or request a small fix…
mission.apiKeyBannerTitle: Set up your LLM provider to start.
mission.apiKeyBannerBody: You need an Anthropic key or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint to plan and execute missions.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.noMissionSelected: Select a mission from the Missions view to see its workspace.
workspace.stickyNotePlaceholder: Tell the agent something it should know on the next step…

report.title: Mission Report
report.subtitle: Generated {{time}}
report.noReportBody: Click "Generate Report" to summarise this mission.
report.learningPatternsTbd: Decision patterns will accumulate as you complete more missions.

approval.rejectReasonPlaceholder: e.g. Don't touch package.json — use src/utils/version.ts instead
approval.rejectReasonHint: Your note will be injected into the agent so it knows why and what to do next. Leave empty if you just want to refuse the action.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Lightweight dashboard for cost trend and runtime anomalies. Updated on demand from your local SQLite.
insights.costTrendEmpty: No cost data yet. Run a mission to start tracking.
insights.anomaliesEmpty: No cost spikes, long-running agents, or recent failures detected.

preflight.title: Pre-flight
preflight.intro: Clarify scope, constraints, exclusions, and assumptions before planning.
preflight.noSession: Start a pre-flight session from the Missions view.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection and retry.
errors.no_api_key: No API key configured for provider "{{provider}}". Open Settings to add one.
errors.approval_already_resolved: This approval has already been resolved.
